mapper.select: SELECT metric_code, avg(value) AS avg_value, max(value) AS max_value, min(value) AS min_value, count(*) AS point_count FROM metric_data_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND metric_code IN #{c} AND collect_time >= #{from} AND collect_time <= #{to} GROUP BY metric_code

SELECT rule_level, count(*) AS cnt, count(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('pending','confirmed','handling')) AS active_cnt FROM alert_event WHERE instance_id IN #{i} AND trigger_time >= #{from} AND trigger_time <= #{to} GROUP BY rule_level

SELECT e.rule_name, e.rule_level, count(*) AS cnt, sum(COALESCE(e.trigger_count, 1)) AS trigger_total, max(r.metric_name) AS metric_code FROM alert_event e LEFT JOIN alert_rule r ON r.id = e.rule_id WHERE e.instance_id IN #{i} AND e.trigger_time >= #{from} AND e.trigger_time <= #{to} GROUP BY e.rule_name, e.rule_level ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT count(*) AS total, count(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('pending','confirmed','handling')) AS active_cnt, count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'recovered') AS recovered_cnt, count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'closed') AS closed_cnt FROM alert_event WHERE instance_id IN #{i} AND trigger_time >= #{from} AND trigger_time <= #{to}
